name: jdy_get_form_widgets
description_zh: 获取指定表单的全部字段定义
description: Get all widget/field definitions of a form (v5). Returns: widgets[] with label/name/widgetName/type (subform has items[]), sysWidgets[] (system fields: flowState/creator/createTime/updateTime etc), dataModifyTime. Field types: text, textarea, number, datetime, radiogroup, checkboxgroup, combo, combocheck, address, location, image, upload, subform, linkdata, lookup, signature, user, usergroup, dept, deptgroup. Rate limit: 30/s.
